data.name: Sophia's Spa
data.detailed_description:
The basic idea of the game is that the main character Sophia solves normal problems in an abnormal way - with sex, so nudity and explicit sex scenes are included in the main story, additional tasks and minigames.

The game has a lot of beautiful women dressed in sexy clothes. The game has a lot of unnecessary nudity and, of course, a lot of unnecessary sex.



  • Total of 4150 static images; 369 animations
  • The game contains a total of 65 characters
  • All images and videos used in the game are made in FullHD 1920 x 1080.
  • Supported platforms: Windows and Linux, 64 bit only

data.short_description: Visual novel about sexual affairs in Sophia's Spa. The basic idea of the game is that the main character Sophia solves normal problems in an abnormal way - with sex, so nudity and explicit sex scenes are included in the main story, additional tasks and minigames.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
